displayTitle: Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi, Vol. 1
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith (1996) #0-5, Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire (1997) #1-5,Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Knights of The Old Republic (1993) #1-5, and material from Dark Horse Comics (1992) #8-9 (“Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi, Part 1-2”) and Dark Horse Insider (1992) #15-20 (“Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast-Wars of Onderon, Part 1-6”)
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi, Vol. 1
